hero.headline: Your Path to Germany – structured and digitally guided.
hero.sub: We prepare international students for university in Germany: from language certificates to the Feststellungsprüfung – personal, clear and transparent.
hero.trust: 50+ nations. Personal guidance. Secure document process.

courses.title: Our Courses
courses.sub: All courses prepare for the official Feststellungsprüfung (FSP) university entrance exam.

t_course.name: T-Course
t_course.desc: For technical programs: Engineering, Mathematics, Physics, Computer Science.

m_course.name: M-Course
m_course.desc: For Medicine, Dentistry, Biology, Biochemistry, Pharmaceutics.

w_course.name: W-Course
w_course.desc: For Economics, Business, Informatics, Law, Social Sciences.

mt_course.name: M/T-Course
mt_course.desc: Combines T and M courses for both technical and medical programs.

courses_page.hero_sub: All courses prepare for the official Feststellungsprüfung (FSP) university entrance exam.
courses_page.fsp_notice: All courses prepare for the FSP. Eligibility is determined by the responsible regional authority. The Studienkolleg guides you through the entire process.
courses_page.main_desc: All courses run for two semesters and conclude with the Feststellungsprüfung (FSP) – the gateway to German universities.
courses_page.lang_desc: If your German level is below B1, we offer intensive preparatory language courses.
courses_page.lang_note: Courses can be combined or booked flexibly depending on demand.
courses_page.starts_note: Exact dates by individual arrangement. Early application recommended.
courses_page.cta_desc: We help you choose the right course and guide you from your first inquiry to enrollment.

t.label: Engineering & Natural Sciences
t.for: For aspiring engineers and natural scientists

m.label: Medicine & Life Sciences
m.for: For aspiring doctors and life scientists

w.label: Business & Social Sciences
w.for: For aspiring business and social science students

mt.label: Medicine + Engineering Combined
mt.for: For students with broad interdisciplinary interest

A1.label: Beginner
A1.desc: No prior knowledge required – structured entry.

courses_page.lang_course_desc: Our language courses prepare you linguistically for the Studienkolleg or German university. B1 is the minimum requirement for all preparatory courses.

visa.name: Visa Support
visa.desc: We assist with all necessary visa documents and translations.

housing.name: Housing
housing.desc: Furnished accommodation solutions in Aachen – ready before your arrival.

mentoring.name: Mentoring & Guidance
mentoring.desc: Personal advisors, check-ins and orientation support.

documents.name: Credential Recognition
documents.desc: We guide you through the recognition process for your school certificates.

uni.name: University Application Coaching
uni.desc: From course selection to uni-assist – we guide you through it.

insurance.name: Health Insurance
insurance.desc: Comprehensive insurance meeting visa and university requirements.

services_page.hero_sub: We guide you from application to admission – and beyond.
services_page.location_desc: Aachen is located at the tri-border region of Germany, Belgium and the Netherlands – home to RWTH Aachen, one of Europe's most prestigious technical universities. International environment, short distances, excellent academic infrastructure.
services_page.process_desc: From first contact to successful course completion.
services_page.cta_desc: Apply now and receive a personal response within 24 hours.

apply.title: Apply
apply.desc: Fill in the online form – done in 10 minutes.

check.title: Review
check.desc: We review your documents and respond within 24 hours.

confirm.title: Confirmation
confirm.desc: Course place secured. Portal access. Visa support begins.

start.title: Course Start
start.desc: Arrival, orientation, classes – we are with you from day one.

contact_page.title: Contact
contact_page.sub: We are here for you – personal, fast and reliable.
contact_page.privacy_notice: Your contact data is used exclusively to process your inquiry.
contact_page.cta_apply_desc: Start your application with the full online form. We respond within 24 hours.
contact_page.whatsapp_desc: Quick questions, document checks or scheduling – we typically respond within a few hours on weekdays.

legal_page.office_note: This location is used for teaching, consulting and applicant reception. It is not identical to the registered business address.
legal_page.de_only_note: These legal documents are legally binding in German only. The English version is provided for orientation purposes only and does not constitute a legally binding translation.

apply.title: Apply Now
apply.sub: Start your journey. We respond within 24 hours.

courses.w: W-Course – Business (Economics, Informatics, Social Sciences, Law)

doc_descs.highschool_diploma: Last diploma / university entrance qualification from your home country
doc_descs.passport: Valid passport (ID card accepted for EU citizens)

home.video_desc: We guide international applicants from the first inquiry to university admission – personal, digital and with full transparency at every step.
video_bullets: Personal guidance and support in German and English
Digital portal for documents, status and communication
Housing, visa support and insurance solutions
home.services_sub: Everything from one source – from consultation to the first semester.
home.process_desc: From inquiry to Studienkolleg – digital, transparent, personal.

process_steps.title: Submit Application
process_steps.desc: Complete the full form and upload your required documents. We will respond within 24 hours.

process_steps.title: AI-Assisted Pre-Screening
process_steps.desc: Our system automatically checks document completeness and prepares the staff evaluation.

process_steps.title: Portal Access & Status Tracking
process_steps.desc: You receive your personal portal with a clear task dashboard and direct contact with the team.

process_steps.title: Admission & Start
process_steps.desc: After review and a personal offer, you receive your admission letter and begin at the Studienkolleg.

home.partner_text: A trusted partner for international students on their way to Germany for years.
home.cta_desc: Apply now with your documents and receive a response within 24 hours.

allinone.title: All-in-One Support
allinone.desc: Language. Visa. Housing. University application. You study – we handle the rest.

central.title: Central Location
central.desc: The only Studienkolleg in the heart of Aachen.

items.q: Do I need German at B1 level?
items.a: For direct enrollment, B1 is required. If your level is lower, we offer preparatory language courses.
No. The final decision is made by the responsible regional authority. We prepare you and support your application.
Our team contacts you within 24 hours and you get access to your personal portal.

items.q: Do you help with the visa?
items.a: Yes. We support all necessary visa documentation in collaboration with reliable partners.
Partial online attendance is possible in the first semester for some programs.

items.q: How much do the courses cost?
items.a: Costs depend on your individual case: course selection, start date, additional services and personal situation. We cannot quote flat rates. After receiving your application, you will receive a personal offer.
